title: Contour — From Brand to Systems
summary_30s: At Contour (then Corporate Flight Management), John started in brand design but shifted toward operational systems. The key insight came from EAS economics: if fixed daily costs are covered, ground-time utilization can unlock adjacent routes at incremental cost.
proof_points: Contributed to launching multiple new markets.
Later led UX/commercial improvements tied to booking conversion and route growth.

title: Storyboard — Discovering Frontline Constraints
summary_30s: Storyboard began as corporate podcasting but usage patterns showed long-form audio did not fit frontline workflow. The team pivoted toward operational voice chat designed for noisy, high-cognitive-load environments.
proof_points: Drove pivot resulting in stronger usage/engagement.

title: Data Mentor — Defending Against Commoditization
summary_30s: At Delta Bravo, John identified that the bottleneck was communication between process experts and data scientists. He built Data Mentor in three weeks to close that gap and support a defensible platform direction.
proof_points: Built initial Data Mentor quickly from identified workflow friction.
Helped drive platform unification strategy and improved differentiation.

title: Aquaspec — Clear Thinking Under Constraint
summary_30s: Aquaspec helped a budget-constrained utility operator evaluate expensive engineering recommendations using structured AI guidance and regulatory context, surfacing savings opportunities and improving decision confidence.
proof_points: Context includes ~$45k immediate savings and possible additional savings.
Program momentum supported by NSF Phase II context.

title: PermitPro — AI with Guardrails
summary_30s: PermitPro was built to reduce permitting backlog using structured journeys and templates while keeping final engineering authority with humans. Principle: AI assists, humans decide.
proof_points: Context includes major administrative time reduction claims.

title: Line Lead — Collision of Worlds
summary_30s: Line Lead came from observing real QSR line work and combining frontline voice patterns, structured agents, and guardrails. A fast demo validated quickly with operators and pilot partners.
proof_points: Secured pilot partners early in product lifecycle context.
